address_full:
28 Nizami Street, 3rd Floor
Baku AZ1000, Azerbaijan
hero_welcome: Welcome to Dr. Hasanli's Neurology Practice
hero_description: Board-certified neurologist with 10+ years helping patients in Baku navigate complex conditions — from migraine and epilepsy to Parkinson's and stroke.
about_description_part1: Dr. Elvin Hasanli is a board-certified neurologist trained at the prestigious Sechenov University in Moscow, with fellowship training at the Cleveland Clinic. He brings world-class neurological expertise to Baku, combining cutting-edge diagnostics with a deeply humanistic approach to patient care.
about_description_part2: Fluent in Azerbaijani, Russian, and English, Dr. Hasanli ensures every patient feels heard and understood — because great neurology starts with listening.
headache_migraine_desc: Advanced diagnosis and treatment of chronic migraine, cluster headaches, and tension-type headaches.
epilepsy_seizures_desc: Comprehensive epilepsy care including EEG monitoring, medication management, and surgical evaluation.
multiple_sclerosis_desc: Disease-modifying therapy, symptom management and long-term care for MS patients.
parkinsons_disease_desc: Personalized care plans for movement disorders, tremor, and neurodegenerative conditions.
stroke_neurology_desc: Rapid evaluation, treatment, and rehabilitation support for stroke and TIA patients.
memory_disorders_desc: Cognitive assessment and management of Alzheimer's disease and dementia syndromes.
neurological_checkup_plans_description: Tailored evaluation packages designed to diagnose, monitor, and prevent neurological conditions.
neurological_baseline_desc: A full diagnostic baseline for patients with first-time neurological symptoms.
migraine_management_desc: Targeted evaluation and personalized treatment plan for headache disorders.
memory_health_checkup_desc: Early detection of cognitive decline and dementia risk assessment.
testimonial_lena: Dr. Hasanli changed my life. After years of debilitating migraines, I finally have a treatment plan that works. His patience and expertise are unmatched.
testimonial_farid: I was terrified after my first seizure. Dr. Hasanli explained everything clearly, adjusted my medications perfectly, and I've been seizure-free for two years.
testimonial_nigar: Managing MS is a lifelong journey, and I'm grateful to have Dr. Hasanli as my neurologist. He stays current with the latest therapies and truly cares.
appointment_cta_description: Same-week appointments available. Both in-clinic and telehealth options to suit your schedule.
appointment_confirmation_message: Same-week appointments available. We'll confirm within 24 hours.
contact_information_description: Reach out by phone, email, or use the form. Our patient coordinator will follow up to confirm your appointment.
request_received_message: Thank you, {{name}}. Our team will contact you within 24 hours to confirm your appointment.
symptoms_reason_label: Describe Your Symptoms / Reason for Visit
symptoms_reason_placeholder: Please briefly describe your main concern or symptoms…
privacy_policy_message: Your information is confidential and protected under our privacy policy.
bio_heading: Passionate about unraveling the mysteries of the brain
bio_paragraph1: Dr. Elvin Hasanli is one of Azerbaijan's most respected neurologists, with specialized training at two of the world's premier institutions — Sechenov University in Moscow and the Cleveland Clinic in Ohio. He returned to Baku to bring world-class neurological care to his community.
bio_paragraph2: His practice is built on three pillars: precise diagnosis using the latest diagnostic tools, evidence-based treatment personalized to each patient, and clear communication that empowers patients to understand and manage their conditions.
timeline_senior_neurologist_desc: Leading the neurology department with a multidisciplinary team approach.
timeline_fellowship_desc: Specialized training in Parkinson's disease, dystonia, and tremor disorders.
timeline_residency_desc: Completed a 2-year residency with honors, specializing in epileptology.
timeline_md_degree_desc: Graduated with distinction. Thesis on vascular risk factors in young stroke patients.
award_best_neurologist: Best Neurologist in Baku — Health Excellence Awards 2023
award_botox_certified: Certified Botox Injector — Allergan Medical Institute
footer_brand_description: Providing compassionate, evidence-based neurological care with over 10 years of experience in Baku and beyond.
copyright: © {{year}} Dr. Elvin Hasanli, MD. All rights reserved.
eeg_testing_desc: Electroencephalography to diagnose epilepsy, encephalopathy, and sleep disorders. Both routine and ambulatory (48h/72h) EEG available.
emg_ncs_desc: Electromyography and nerve conduction studies for diagnosing carpal tunnel, neuropathy, radiculopathy, and neuromuscular diseases.
botox_for_migraines_desc: OnabotulinumtoxinA injections every 12 weeks for adults with chronic migraine (15+ headache days/month). Covered by most insurers.
lumbar_puncture_desc: Diagnostic cerebrospinal fluid analysis for infections, MS, autoimmune conditions, and subarachnoid hemorrhage.
nerve_block_injections_desc: Greater occipital nerve blocks, supraorbital nerve blocks, and sphenopalatine ganglion blocks for acute headache relief.
cognitive_assessment_desc: Standardized cognitive screening tests (MoCA, MMSE, ACE-III) for early detection of dementia and mild cognitive impairment.
neurological_consultation_desc: Comprehensive initial consultation with history, neurological examination, and diagnostic plan. New and follow-up patients welcome.
telehealth_consultation_desc: Secure video consultations for follow-ups, medication reviews, second opinions, and patients outside Baku.
not_sure_service_needed_heading: Not sure which service you need?
not_sure_service_needed_description: Book a general consultation and Dr. Hasanli will guide you to the right diagnostic path.
diagnostic_treatment_services_descriptio: Equipped with the latest neurology diagnostics — in one place.
